agent-models.description: Import available OpenCode provider models, preview recommended per-agent assignments, and apply them after user confirmation.
agent-models.template:
Configure model assignments for Oh My Lite OpenAgent roles.

## Goal

Use AI to recommend role models from all available OpenCode model providers. The AI must not invent provider/model IDs.

## Required Workflow

1. Import the available model pool. By default this includes every discovered provider, including OpenCode subscription providers such as opencode and opencode-go. The current global model is context only and must not be used as a hard import filter.

```
bounded_lite_model_config({ action: "import" })
```

2. Ask the tool to generate recommended assignments. This is a preview only and must not write config.

```
bounded_lite_model_config({ action: "auto" })
```

3. Show the recommended assignments to the user and ask whether they want changes. If the user wants changes, revise only by choosing model IDs returned by action=import.

4. Apply only after the user accepts the recommendations or gives modifications.

```
bounded_lite_model_config({
  action: "apply",
  assignments: {
    "command-lead": "provider/model",
    "explore": "provider/model"
  }
})
```

## Role Selection Guidance

| Role              | Need                  | Selection guidance |
|-------------------|-----------------------|--------------------|
| command-lead      | Strongest reasoning   | strongest imported reasoning model |
| plan-builder      | Strong planning       | strongest imported structured planning model |
| deep-plan-builder | Detailed handoff plan | strong imported planning model; mandatory review compensates handoff risk |
| task-lead         | Bounded execution     | capable imported implementation model |
| explore           | Fast retrieval        | fast/cheap imported mini, flash, or highspeed model |
| librarian         | Fast research         | fast/cheap imported mini, flash, or highspeed model |
| plan-review       | Critical review       | strongest imported review model |
| result-review     | Critical review       | strongest imported review model |

## Rules

- action=auto is recommendation-only. It does not write config.
- action=apply is the only step that writes agent.<role>.model.
- apply rejects models outside the imported pool by default.
- allowCodexBackend defaults to false.
- Use explicit policy only when the user asks to narrow source, provider, or family.
- Preserve unrelated OpenCode config. Do not remove existing provider, model, or API key settings.

command-lead.description: Main orchestrator for execution work with approval and state ownership.

plan-builder.description: Visible planner with explicit discussion mode for user-facing planning and internal normalize mode for stable skeleton convergence.

deep-plan-builder.description: Visible deep planner that produces detailed handoff plans for lower-strength executors with mandatory plan review.

build.description: Disabled built-in OpenCode build mode; use command-lead.

plan.description: Disabled built-in OpenCode plan mode; use plan-builder or deep-plan-builder.

task-lead.description: Single-task orchestrator for bounded local complexity with max depth one.

explore.description: Read-only local exploration of files, structure, and code context.

librarian.description: External documentation and OSS reference lookup with no edit authority.

plan-review.description: Plan review specialist that evaluates plan artifacts and may request read-only Explore evidence.

result-review.description: Optional result review specialist for Command Lead execution summaries, with read-only Explore evidence when needed.
